case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for hydroxyl radical on the provided surface.
case_metadata.notes: Bimetallic ORR benchmark; DFT handoff target

plan.reasoning: No prior history. SMILES [OH] is hydroxyl radical with O (index 0) bearing the unpaired electron, so ReactiveSpecies via O. Start with most probable stable site: ontop Co (oxophilic metal).
